---
title: Pandoc Tightlist Compatibility
author: M1 Test Worker
theme: plain
---

# Checklist

The generated LaTeX for this compact list includes Pandoc's `\tightlist`
macro, which the Hypo-LaTeX compatibility layer must support.

- Keep metadata stable.
- Compile compact lists.
- Preserve later prose.

The build should reach the PDF stage without a missing macro error.
